visual_description: A man with dark hair and a mustache is shown in a close-up, his face contorted in pain as he holds his hand to his mouth. He is sitting in the passenger seat of a car, with another man visible in the background, also appearing distressed. The scene is dimly lit, suggesting it is nighttime.
audio_description: A man is speaking in a strained, pained voice, his words difficult to understand due to the heavy breathing and emotional distress. The audio quality is somewhat muffled, making the speech unclear.
